{{Infobox madra
| name = vital aura
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[vital aura Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Vital [[aura]] is the fundamental energy of the natural world, acting as a pervasive force that permeates the heavens and the earth. It is described as having no beginning or end, existing as a unified whole that takes on various specific [[aspects]] depending on its environment. These [[aspects]] include elements such as fire, [[water]], [[wind]], earth, light, [[dreams]], death, [[blood]], [[hunger]], and [[destruction]]. While the [[aura]] is interconnected, it manifests in distinct colors and sensations that can be perceived through [[Spiritual sight{{!}}spiritual sight]]. In the progression of [[sacred arts]], vital [[aura]] serves as a critical resource. Practitioners at the [[Copper stage]] can open their spirits to harvest this environmental energy and process it into [[madra]], which fuels their bodies and abilities. This ability to cycle [[aura]] from the surroundings is considered the essential first step for any [[sacred artist]]. The density and balance of local [[aura]] can influence the speed and safety of spiritual [[advancement]], and certain locations with perfectly balanced [[aspects]] are known to give rise to natural spirits like [[Sylvan Riverseed{{!}}Sylvan Riverseeds]]. Beyond individual cultivation, vital [[aura]] interacts with the world in several ways. It can be gathered by [[constructs]] to power them, manipulated through [[scripts]], or used to create [[resonance]] with weapons. It also plays a role in the development of non-human entities; for instance, plants and trees can absorb [[aura]] over centuries to develop rudimentary spirits. Furthermore, the presence of certain types of [[aura]] can influence the behavior and power of creatures, such as [[sacred beasts]] or [[dragons]].}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[vital aura{{!}}Vital aura]] is absorbed by animals and plants to facilitate [[advancement]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Copper stage]] allows the ability to cycle [[vital aura]] from heaven and earth.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[vital aura{{!}}Vital aura]] responds to [[sword]] [[resonance]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[sacred beast{{!}}Sacred beasts]] refine [[vital aura]] into [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[vital aura{{!}}Vital aura]] is like the [[madra]] of the natural world and returns to its source.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A rainbow of [[vital aura]] rises over the pyramid.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The mining mechanism draws in [[vital aura]] from the region.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[vital aura{{!}}Vital aura]] can be sensed by [[Copper]] senses.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[cloudship]] must fly lower when the [[vital aura]] runs low.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[vital aura{{!}}Vital aura]] is the power of the world.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[vital aura{{!}}Vital aura]] can generate [[sword aura]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is woven from condensed [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[vital aura{{!}}Vital aura]] makes [[Cradle]] larger than average for an inhabited planet and affects how humanity spreads.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[vital aura{{!}}Vital aura]] can still like a held breath.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] watches the [[vital aura]] in the air.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[vital aura{{!}}Vital aura]] is described as having no beginning and no end.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has a connection to the [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Lands with strong [[vital aura]] can experience [[aura]]-storms.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] can freeze [[vital aura]] with her will.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Fury]]'s [[technique]] involves something deeper than [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[vital aura]] was muted and washed out near the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Skepticism could be seen in the [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Tension in the air can be sensed as a vibration in the [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[vital aura{{!}}Vital aura]] is a chaotic power that spins like a churning sea.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[vital aura{{!}}Vital aura]] can be focused over hundreds of miles.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] reaches out to a buzzing [[vital aura]] during his transformation.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Tiberian Arelius{{!}}Tiberian]] can Rule the [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Cycling [[vital aura]] is more difficult than normal meditation.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] felt the [[vital aura]] in [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
